output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here’s How to Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no sign-up needed.
content_outline: Why Landlords Illegally Withhold Security Deposits (And Get Away With It)
State-by-State Tenant Rights: Deadlines and Deduction Rules
The 60-Second Fix: How a Demand Letter Gets Your Money Back Fast
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14–30 days and provide an itemized deduction list.
A formal demand letter citing state law is often the fastest, most effective way to force a landlord to return your deposit.
Deposits-Back.com lets you generate and send a legally sound security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for a flat $19.99—no sign-up, no subscription.
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord keep what’s yours. Generate your deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no sign-up, no subscription.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, delaying, or deducting from their security deposit.

Stop asking ‘can my landlord keep my security deposit?’ Start sending this 👇
